title: For the choirmaster. Of David. To bring remembrance.

verses.1: Make haste, O God, to deliver me! Hurry, O LORD, to help me!
verses.2: May those who seek my life be ashamed and confounded; may those who wish me harm be repelled and humiliated.
verses.3: May those who say, “Aha, aha!” retreat because of their shame.
verses.4: May all who seek You rejoice and be glad in You; may those who love Your salvation always say, “Let God be magnified!”
verses.5: But I am poor and needy; hurry to me, O God. You are my help and my deliverer; O LORD, do not delay.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
